data.description: 6 cards, 1973-1980. Includes 1973 Topps, 1976 Topps (pen mark noted), 1977 Topps, and O-Pee-Chee variants. All in top loaders. Raw mid-grade condition.

data.notes: Pen on 1976 Topps must be called out. OPC variants have distinct collector appeal. All in top loaders is a positive signal.
6 cards is smaller than most comps. OPC adds appeal. Pen on '76 pulls it down.

data.title: Pete Rose 6-Card Vintage Lot 1973-1980 Topps O-Pee-Chee OPC Top Loaders
data.description:
Six Pete Rose cards spanning his peak Reds years, 1973 through 1980, including Topps and O-Pee-Chee variants. These came out of a longtime collection and have been stored in top loaders. If you're building a Rose player collection or just want a solid chunk of his vintage run, this is a nice little lot to grab.

Cards | 6 total
Years | 1973, 1976, 1977, plus O-Pee-Chee variants
Brands | Topps, O-Pee-Chee
Condition | Raw mid-grade, Good to Very Good range
Notes | Pen mark on the 1976 Topps — noted and priced accordingly
Storage | All in top loaders

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer.

Sold As Is.
data.condition_field: 6-card raw lot, Good to Very Good overall. 1973 Topps, 1976 Topps (pen mark on front), 1977 Topps, plus O-Pee-Chee variants. All stored in top loaders. Pen mark on the 1976 card is noted in the title and photos.
